/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/B1-EtcdKvBenchmark.dir/B1-EtcdKvBenchmark.cc.o" -o B1-EtcdKvBenchmark  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/gongzhijie/Desktop/projects/git/galay-etcd/build/galay-etcd -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../galay-etcd/libgalay-etcd.dylib /usr/local/lib/libgalay-http.1.0.0.dylib /usr/local/lib/libgalay-kernel.1.0.0.dylib /usr/local/lib/libspdlog.a -lpthread
